name: Cembre S.p.A.
summary: Cembre S.p.A., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells electrical connectors and related tools in Italy, rest of Europe, and internationally. The company offers pre-insulated, un-insulated, and other types of electrical connectors, as well as flexible braids for earthing moving elements; mechanical tools for crimping electrical connectors, and cutting and preparing cables; hydraulic tools for crimping electrical connectors, and cutting and preparing conductors; products for railway electrical connections; and machinery for track maintenance; and hand tools. It also provides cable glands and fixing components, brass and steel cable glands and fixing components, brass extensions, brass reducer bushes and converters, rutaseal grommets, and modular retaining clips; and identification and labeling systems, such as thermal transfer systems, manual cable marking systems, document wallets, and warning labels. In addition, the company offers heat-shrinkable tubing products, cable ties and tooling, cable and conduit clips, cable preparation tools, hand tools, insulated covers for uninsulated connectors, and cast resin cable joints. Its products are used in power production and transport, electrical systems, and industrial and railway applications. The company was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Brescia, Italy. Cembre S.p.A. is a subsidiary of Lysne S.p.A.
